name: productivity-toolkit
description: Cross-platform office and research productivity skills with conservative file and evidence handling.

interface.shortDescription: Reports, research, data cleaning, document review, and presentation planning.
interface.longDescription: Productivity Toolkit provides public-safe, cross-industry workflows for structured reports, sourced research briefs, traceable spreadsheet cleaning, document and PDF review, meeting actions, presentation outlines, and cross-content consistency checks.
defaultPrompt: Turn these materials into an evidence-aware report.
Clean this spreadsheet into a new auditable output.
Check these documents for conflicting figures and dates.
